title: OldVisuals
description: Adds back some visuals from 1.7 and earlier
body:
# OldVisuals Simple Client-side Fabric mod that adds back some visuals from 1.7 and earlier.

All features can be individually enabled/disabled, either by directly editing its config file or via its [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) settings screen

## Features: ### - Armor turns red upon receiving damage:
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b737335c7ea3f78eaabdfe745f71c7ee4a4cf96f_0.webp) ### - Disabled cooldown animation (NOTE: this only disables the client-side animation, the cooldown mechanic is still there):
![cooldown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ab3029a61260c8372b284f8ded572c9c8fbe824_0.webp) ### - 2D Dropped Item Rendering (This can slightly improve FPS on certain scenarios) ![dropped items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/610f3996c10cf9f8ec658e36298c2a5a3f413884.png) ### - Old third person sword/tool position:
![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02fd1cf1cab7785296aa3ef1b627498c782e5601.png) ### - Old first person fishing rod position:
![rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0191738600a88d0ab646f42d84cab956e822d63_0.webp) ### - Old third person item position:
![item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/746b0cebe193815ec75301974ffa86cb53fac53a.png) ### - Crosshair renders in third person:
![crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab6114e5572555c8df13deae2d732a5faf5e73.png)
